hypothesis: Incorporating electron beam dose rate as a dynamic conditioning variable during SAM-EM fine-tuning—by generating synthetic training data that explicitly pairs spatiotemporally varying dose rate maps with corresponding SNR-degraded frames—will enable the model to predict beam-induced artifact trajectories separately from true particle motion, thereby allowing closed-loop LPTEM systems to automatically modulate dose rate in real time to maintain segmentation fidelity above a target J&F threshold without sacrificing temporal resolution.
